problem id: 7e246b00
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(5) AND NOT SHR(5)) XOR NOT SHL(6)

examples:
  00001010 -> 00111110
  11100100 -> 01100111
  00011110 -> 10111100
  01101000 -> 11110011
  10111011 -> 01001101
  10001001 -> 10001110
  01010010 -> 00110111
  11100111 -> 11000111
  11011001 -> 10000110
  01000000 -> 11110111

query: 01101100
predicted answer: 01110011
